name: WHO 5 Moments for Hand Hygiene
description: Default protocol. A hospital can copy this file, edit rules/thresholds, and point the engine at it (PROTOCOL_PATH env) WITHOUT touching code or models -- as long as the events referenced are ones the perception layer already detects.

rules.name: Truoc khi cham benh nhan
rules.ok: Tay sach (da ve sinh) ngay truoc khi cham BN.
rules.bad: Tay khong sach truoc khi cham BN (chua ve sinh tay).

rules.name: Truoc thu thuat vo trung
rules.ok: Tay sach ngay truoc thu thuat vo trung.
rules.bad: Tay khong sach truoc thu thuat vo trung.

rules.name: Sau nguy co dich co the
rules.bad: Sau nguy co tiep xuc dich co the, tiep xuc ma chua ve sinh tay.

rules.name: Sau khi cham moi truong quanh BN
rules.bad: Cham moi truong quanh BN roi cham BN ma chua ve sinh tay.

rules.name: Sau khi cham benh nhan
rules.bad: Sau khi cham BN, bat dau tiep xuc moi ma chua ve sinh tay.
